scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgYellow.bold" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,RASA,ACTIONS" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:rasa" "npm run dev:actions" "npm run show:access-points"
scripts.dev:core: npm run show:core-message && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:rasa: cd backend && "../.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -m rasa run --enable-api --cors "*" --port 5005 -i localhost --endpoints endpoints.yml
scripts.dev:actions: cd backend && "../.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -m rasa run actions --actions api.external.rasa_actions --port 5055
scripts.clean-start: powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name python,node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 3; echo 'Ports cleared, starting services...'"; npm run dev:all
scripts.kill-ports: powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name python,node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; echo 'All processes killed'"
scripts.show:startup-message: echo. && echo 🚀 STARTING AUTOMOTIVE CHATBOT PLATFORM... && echo. && echo 📱 Frontend: http://localhost:3000 (starting...) && echo 🔧 Backend API: http://localhost:8000 (starting...) && echo 📚 API Docs: http://localhost:8000/docs (starting...) && echo 🤖 Rasa API: http://localhost:5005 (starting...) && echo 🎯 Rasa Actions: http://localhost:5055 (starting...) && echo 💾 MongoDB: mongodb://localhost:27017 && echo. && echo ⏳ Services are starting up... && echo.
scripts.show:core-message: echo. && echo 🚀 STARTING CORE PLATFORM (Backend + Frontend)... && echo. && echo 📱 Frontend: http://localhost:3000 (starting...) && echo 🔧 Backend API: http://localhost:8000 (starting...) && echo 📚 API Docs: http://localhost:8000/docs (starting...) && echo 💾 MongoDB: mongodb://localhost:27017 && echo. && echo ⏳ Core services are starting up... && echo.
scripts.show:access-points: echo. && echo 🚀 AUTOMOTIVE CHATBOT PLATFORM READY! && echo. && echo 📱 Frontend: http://localhost:3000 && echo 🔧 Backend API: http://localhost:8000 && echo 📚 API Docs: http://localhost:8000/docs && echo 🤖 Rasa API: http://localhost:5005 && echo 🎯 Rasa Actions: http://localhost:5055 && echo 💾 MongoDB: mongodb://localhost:27017 && echo. && echo ✅ All services started successfully! && echo.
scripts.install:all: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.status: echo Checking services... && curl -f http://localhost:3000 && curl -f http://localhost:8000/health && curl -f http://localhost:5005/status
scripts.rasa:test-nlu: cd backend && "..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe" -m rasa test nlu --nlu data/nlu.yml --cross-validation
scripts.rasa:evaluate: cd backend && "..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe" -m rasa test --stories tests/test_stories.yml --e2e --out results
scripts.rasa:train-evaluate: npm run rasa:train && npm run rasa:evaluate
scripts.rasa:full-report: cd backend && "..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe" -m rasa test --stories tests/test_stories.yml --e2e --out results && echo 📊 Training report generated in backend/results/
scripts.retrain-and-start: npm run train:rasa && npm run dev:all
scripts.clean-start: npm run kill-ports && npm run retrain-and-start
